pricing.title: One price. Yours forever.
pricing.subtitle: Pay once. Get lifetime access and all future updates.

features.essentialTools: Full source code — own it forever

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before you buy

dataSafety.question: What do I actually get when I buy?
dataSafety.answer: You get the full source code as a ZIP file, lifetime access to all future updates via your members area, and a production-ready Next.js SaaS with auth, AI, billing, blog, admin, SEO and more already built.

gettingStarted.question: How long does it take to get started?
gettingStarted.answer: Most developers have a running local environment within an hour. You fill in your environment variables, run two commands to set up the database, and you're live.

crmCompatibility.question: What does it cost to run per month?
crmCompatibility.answer: Effectively $0 to start. Vercel, Neon, Resend, and PostHog all have generous free tiers. Stripe only charges a percentage on actual revenue. You only pay services when you're making money.

salesGoals.question: Can I use this for client projects?
salesGoals.answer: Yes. Your license covers unlimited personal and client projects. The only restriction is that you cannot resell or redistribute the source code itself.

freeTrial.title: Ready to ship your SaaS?
freeTrial.description: Stop building boilerplate. Start building your product.

footer.description: {name} is a production-ready SaaS starter kit. Ship faster with auth, AI, billing, blog and admin — all included.
